texto: The Zankli Sacred Prayer: Oh God, I bring before you your children you have gifted with the light. Bring unto them what is yours to give, your to provide, and yours to understand. Bless them with the joy of goodness, and deliver unto them longevity, wisdom and foresight.
explicacao: Citação de M.J. Duff sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The Zankli Sacred Prayer: Oh God, I bring before you your children you have gifted with the light…” articula reflexao, inspirational-living, bring em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
